haiku:
Bright papel picado,
Margaritas swirl and dance,
Spicy bites delight.
Happy #CincoDeMayo from @ClamBakeSanta

Salty kisses sway,
Shells open like summer sun,
Joy on every plate.
Happy #NationalOysterDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful voices cheer,
Cupcakes swirl in frosted hues,
Adventures await!
#HappyBirthdayNellieBly from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright thoughts dance like leaves,
In autumn's crisp embrace,
Joy blooms in the heart.
#HappyBirthdaySorenKierkegaard from @ClamBakeSanta
